question: Observed system: The system stopped. Before that it became noisy. Before that it ran hotter. Before that efficiency slowly declined. Question: Which learned mechanism category would make this reversed observation chain expected?

Observed system: Nothing passed. Before that receivers waited. Before that the backlog built. Before that the delivery rate dropped. Question: Which learned mechanism category would make this reversed observation chain expected?

Observed system: It collapsed. Before that the tilt increased. Before that cracks appeared. Before that one area sagged. Question: Which learned mechanism category would make this reversed observation chain expected?

Observed system: It would not move. Before that it warmed. Before that it rattled. Before that movement became slower. Question: Which learned mechanism category would make this reversed observation chain expected?

Observed system: The receiving end waited. Before that queues grew. Before that output dropped. Before that arrivals became sporadic. Question: Which learned mechanism category would make this reversed observation chain expected?

Observed system: It broke. Before that the edge dropped. Before that a fracture grew. Before that one corner bowed. Question: Which learned mechanism category would make this reversed observation chain expected?
